HOW DEBENHAMS USES COOKIES

We use cookies that help us provide you with the best possible shopping experience with us. For example, they allow us to connect to social networks, display personalised content, as well as analyse and improve the operation of our website. Cookie Policy

Customize Consent Preferences

We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.

The cookies that are categorized as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ... 

For more information on how Google's third-party cookies operate and handle your data, see: Google Privacy Policy

Always Active

Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

  • Cookie
    __session
  • Duration
    1 month
  • Description

    Debenhams sets this cookie to store temporary session information while you browse, allowing us to maintain your shopping cart, login status, and site preferences during your visit.

  • Cookie
    cookieyes-consent
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    CookieYes sets this cookie to remember users' consent preferences so that their preferences are respected on subsequent visits to this site. It does not collect or store any personal information about the site visitors.
  • Cookie
    forterToken
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days
  • Description

    Helps detect and prevent fraud during your visit to ensure secure transactions

  • Cookie
    aws-waf-token
  • Duration
    4 days
  • Description
    This cookie is set by AWS Web Application Firewall (WAF) to help protect our website against malicious traffic and cyber attacks. It enables security features that safeguard user data and maintain the integrity and availability of our online services.

     

  • Cookie
    _cfuvid
  • Duration
    session
  • Description
    Cloudflare sets this cookie to track users across sessions to optimize user experience by maintaining session consistency and providing personalized services
  • Cookie
    VISITOR_PRIVACY_METADATA
  • Duration
    6 months
  • Description
    YouTube sets this cookie to store the user's cookie consent state for the current domain.
  • Cookie
    datadome
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    This is a security cookie set by Force24 to detect BOTS and malicious traffic.
  • Cookie
    enforce_policy
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    Paypal sets this cookie to ensure compliance with PayPal policies for secure payments.
  • Cookie
    x-pp-s
  • Duration
    session
  • Description
    PayPal sets this cookie to manage user sessions, states, and preferences while navigating through PayPal payment flows.
  • Cookie
    tsrce
  • Duration
    3 days
  • Description
    PayPal sets this cookie to track the origin of the transaction for fraud prevention.
  • Cookie
    nsid
  • Duration
    session
  • Description
    This cookie is set by the provider PayPal to enable the PayPal payment service in the website.
  • Cookie
    ts_c
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    PayPal sets this cookie to ensure the security of transactions and verify user authentication.
  • Cookie
    l7_az
  • Duration
    1 hour
  • Description

    This cookie is necessary for the PayPal login function on the website.

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

  • Cookie
    g
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    Payment services

  • Cookie
    lantern
  • Duration
    1 month
  • Description

    Tracks user interactions and conversions across advertising channels to measure marketing campaign effectiveness.

     
  • Cookie
    X-AB
  • Duration
    1 day
  • Description
    Adobe Analytics sets this cookie in context with multi-variate testing. This is a tool used to combine or change content on the website. This allows the website to find the best variation or edition of the site.
  • Cookie
    _scid
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 1 minute
  • Description
    This cookie is set by Snapchat to store Snapchat Pixel unique ID of the User.
  • Cookie
    is_eu
  • Duration
    session
  • Description
    No description available.
  • Cookie
    amigo-id
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    This cookie stores a unique identifier to enable personalized content delivery and user experience optimization across sessions.

  • Cookie
    amigo-session-id
  • Duration
    1 hour
  • Description

    This cookie is set by GetAmigo service to maintain session data and ensure proper functionality of integrated GetAmigo features.

  • Cookie
    tfc-l
  • Duration
    1 month
  • Description

    This cookie is used by TrueFit to store sizing preferences and fit recommendations to provide personalized product sizing guidance.

  • Cookie
    VISITOR_INFO1_LIVE
  • Duration
    6 months
  • Description
    A cookie set by YouTube to measure bandwidth that determines whether the user gets the new or old player interface.
  • Cookie
    ytidb::LAST_RESULT_ENTRY_KEY
  • Duration
    Never Expires
  • Description
    The cookie ytidb::LAST_RESULT_ENTRY_KEY is used by YouTube to store the last search result entry that was clicked by the user. This information is used to improve the user experience by providing more relevant search results in the future.
  • Cookie
    LANG
  • Duration
    9 hours
  • Description
    Linkedin set this cookie to set user's preferred language.

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

  • Cookie
    ABTastySession
  • Duration
    1 hour
  • Description
    ABTasty sets this cookie to identify a unique session. It allows us to determine that a new session has begun for a given user.
  • Cookie
    ABTasty
  • Duration
    1 year 22 days
  • Description
    ABTasty sets this cookie to send all test data (visitor ID, test and variant IDs, timestamps).
  • Cookie
    __utmzzses
  • Duration
    session
  • Description
    Google Analytics sets this cookie to gather information about how a visitor uses the site.
  • Cookie
    BVBRANDID
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    This cookie is a performance cookie used for internal Bazaarvoice web analytics, to be correlated to the same user for interactions within a particular client domain.

  • Cookie
    BVBRANDSID
  • Duration
    1 hour
  • Description

    This cookie is set by Bazaarvoice. This is a session cookie used for internal Bazaarvoice web analytics to be correlated to the same user browsing session for interactions within a particular client domain.

  • Cookie
    bv_metrics
  • Duration
    2 hours
  • Description

    Bazaarvoice Analytics

  • Cookie
    _taggstar_ses
  • Duration
    session
  • Description

    Taggstar Analytics - Social Proof

  • Cookie
    _taggstar_vid
  • Duration
    session
  • Description

    Taggstar Analytics - Social Proof

  • Cookie
    _taggstar_exp
  • Duration
    session
  • Description

    Taggstar Analytics - Social Proof

  • Cookie
    _gd*
  • Duration
    session
  • Description
    Google sets this cookie to allow the use of Google Analytics service for anonymous visitor tracking on the website. Google Analytics is used to compile reports and improve the site.
  • Cookie
    _gcl_au
  • Duration
    3 months
  • Description
    Google Tag Manager sets the cookie to experiment advertisement efficiency of websites using their services.
  • Cookie
    _ga
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days
  • Description
    Google Analytics sets this cookie to calculate visitor, session and campaign data and track site usage for the site's analytics report. The cookie stores information anonymously and assigns a randomly generated number to recognise unique visitors.
  • Cookie
    _ga_*
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days
  • Description
    Google Analytics sets this cookie to store and count page views.
  • Cookie
    FPID
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days
  • Description
    Google Tag Manager sets this cookie for server-side tagging.
  • Cookie
    FPLC
  • Duration
    20 hours
  • Description
    Google Tag Manager sets this cookie for tracking between domains.
  • Cookie
    FPGSID
  • Duration
    1 hour
  • Description
    Description is currently not available.
  • Cookie
    ABTastyDomainTest
  • Duration
    session
  • Description

    ABTasty sets this cookie to identify a unique domain for variant testing.

  • Cookie
    flixgvid
  • Duration
    session
  • Description

    This cookie is set by Flixmedia, a content syndication platform that provides product information from manufacturers. It creates a unique visitor ID within the Flixmedia network and tracks user interactions with Flixmedia content displayed on the website to improve shopping experience.

  • Cookie
    __exponea_etc__
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days 1 minute
  • Description
    Bloomreach sets this cookie to store a unique user ID.
  • Cookie
    dbz_clickstream_lastEventTime
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    Records when you last interacted with our website to help us understand user engagement and improve your experience.

  • Cookie
    dbz_clickstream_machineId
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    Creates an anonymous identifier to help us understand how our website is used.

  • Cookie
    dbz_clickstream_sessionId
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    Tracks your browsing session anonymously to help us analyze how visitors navigate our website and improve usability.

  • Cookie
    _clck
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    Connects activity from multiple browsing sessions to help us understand how visitors use our website over time. Set by Microsoft Clarity for anonymous usage analytics.

  • Cookie
    _clsk
  • Duration
    1 day
  • Description

    Tracks your current browsing session and counts page views within that session. Set by Microsoft Clarity for anonymous usage analytics.

  • Cookie
    YSC
  • Duration
    session
  • Description
    YSC cookie is set by Youtube and is used to track the views of embedded videos on Youtube pages.
  • Cookie
    taboola_session_id
  • Duration
    session
  • Description
    This cookie is owned by trc.taboola.com and is used to create a temporary session ID to prevent duplicate recommendations from being displayed on the page.

Advertisement cookies are used to provide visitors with customized advertisements based on the pages you visited previously and to analyze the effectiveness of the ad campaigns.

  • Cookie
    initialTrafficSource
  • Duration
    1 month
  • Description

    Initial source cookie to support in-session tracking &amp;amp; event triggers

  • Cookie
    xnpe_32af3b60-df63-11ed-99db-feca6fcda980
  • Duration
    session
  • Description

    Customer's Bloomreach Engagement generated server-side cookie

  • Cookie
    __exponea_time2__
  • Duration
    1 hour 1 minute
  • Description

    Bloomreach Timestamp offset between browser and server time

  • Cookie
    __exponea_etc__
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 4 days 1 minute
  • Description
    Bloomreach sets this cookie to store a unique user ID.
  • Cookie
    UD.TID
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month
  • Description

    Unidays

  • Cookie
    UD.VID
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month
  • Description

    Unidays

  • Cookie
    temp
  • Duration
    session
  • Description

    Unidays

  • Cookie
    region
  • Duration
    Never Expires
  • Description

    Unidays

  • Cookie
    country
  • Duration
    Never Expires
  • Description

    Unidays

  • Cookie
    _scid_r
  • Duration
    1 year 1 month 1 minute
  • Description

    Snapchat Analytics

  • Cookie
    __rtbh.uid
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    Collects information on user behaviour on multiple websites.
    This information is used in order to optimize the relevance of advertisement on the website via RTBHouse.

  • Cookie
    __rtbh.lid
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    Collects information on user behaviour on multiple websites.
    This information is used in order to optimize the relevance of advertisement on the website via RTBHouse.

  • Cookie
    ar_debug
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    This cookie is used by Ad Services to debug ads.
  • Cookie
    22735_lantern
  • Duration
    6 months
  • Description

    Stores a reference to a visit to attribute a sale to marketing channels

  • Cookie
    ts
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    This cookie is set by RTB House, a third-party advertising technology provider. It contains a timestamp that helps optimize ad delivery.

  • Cookie
    test_cookie
  • Duration
    15 minutes
  • Description
    doubleclick.net sets this cookie to determine if the user's browser supports cookies.
  • Cookie
    IDE
  • Duration
    1 year 24 days
  • Description
    Google DoubleClick IDE cookies store information about how the user uses the website to present them with relevant ads according to the user profile.
  • Cookie
    sc_at
  • Duration
    session
  • Description
    Snapchat sets this cookie for showing relevant advertising based on the user’s movement.
  • Cookie
    c
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    Rubicon Project sets this cookie to control the synchronization of user identification and the exchange of user data between various ad services.
  • Cookie
    _pinterest_ct_ua
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    No description available.
  • Cookie
    _pin_unauth
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    Pinterest set this cookie to group actions for users who cannot be identified.
  • Cookie
    _uetsid
  • Duration
    1 day
  • Description

    This cookie is used by Microsoft Bing Ads to track conversions and user interactions for advertising campaign measurement and optimization.

  • Cookie
    _uetvid
  • Duration
    1 month
  • Description

    This cookie is used by Microsoft Bing Ads to store a unique visitor identifier for tracking conversions, remarketing, and advertising campaign optimization across multiple sessions.

  • Cookie
    MUID
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    This cookie is set by Microsoft to provide a unique identifier across Microsoft services for analytics, advertising optimization, and cross-platform user tracking.

  • Cookie
    AF_BANNERS_SESSION_ID
  • Duration
    session
  • Description

    This cookie is set by AppsFlyer to track user engagement with promotional banners and ad campaigns. It registers a unique session ID to attribute mobile app installations and website visits back to specific marketing channels.

  • Cookie
    __Secure-YNID
  • Duration
    6 months
  • Description
    YouTube cookie used to protect user security and prevent fraud, especially during the login process.
  • Cookie
    __Secure-ROLLOUT_TOKEN
  • Duration
    6 months
  • Description
    YouTube sets this cookie to manage feature rollout and experimentation. It helps Google control which new features or interface changes are shown to users as part of testing and staged rollouts, ensuring consistent experience for a given user during an experiment.
  • Cookie
    __Secure-YEC
  • Duration
    past
  • Description
    Description is currently not available.
  • Cookie
    t_pt_gid
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description

    This cookie is set by Taboola to assign a unique tracking identifier to visitors. It monitors engagement with native content widgets and promotional campaigns to deliver personalized recommendations and measure advertisement performance across third-party websites.

  • Cookie
    t_gid
  • Duration
    1 year
  • Description
    Taboola sets this cookie by assigning a specific ID for attribution and reporting purposes and to tailor recommendations to the user.

Other uncategorized cookies are those that are being analyzed and have not been classified into a category as yet.

No cookies to display.

Welcome to Debenhams, your digital destination for Fashion, Beauty and Home. Consider this your one-stop-shop for all of life’s essentials, from kitchen staples to new season looks, and cult beauty names, find everything under one roof. With the biggest names in fashion for women, men, and kids there's something for everyone to discover today. As the spring/summer season is approaching, why not explore our latest occasion collections, with trendy outfits for race day, weddings and garden parties.
